mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_tag( owner_user_id, tag_name, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{ownerUserId}, #{tagName}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: SELECT t.tag_name FROM sys_tag t LEFT JOIN sys_document_tag dt ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id WHERE t.owner_user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY t.tag_id, t.tag_name ORDER BY COUNT(dt.document_id) DESC

SELECT MIN(t.tag_id) AS tag_id, MIN(t.owner_user_id) AS owner_user_id, t.tag_name, MIN(t.tag_key) AS tag_key FROM sys_tag t INNER JOIN sys_document_tag dt ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id INNER JOIN sys_document d ON dt.document_id = d.document_id WHERE t.del_flag = '0' AND d.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY t.tag_name ORDER BY MIN(t.tag_id)
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_document_tag WHERE document_id in
#{documentId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_document_tag where document_id = #{documentId} and tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_document_tag(document_id, tag_id, create_time) values(#{documentId}, #{tagId}, #{createTime})
